from collections import deque


def moving_average(values: list[float], window: int) -> list[float]:
    result = []
    window_sum = sum(values[:window])
    result.append(window_sum / window)
    for i in range(window, len(values)):
        window_sum += values[i] - values[i - window]
        result.append(window_sum / window)
    return result


def detect_spikes(readings: list[float], window: int, threshold: float) -> list[int]:
    spike_indices = []
    window_sum = sum(readings[:window])
    for i in range(window, len(readings)):
        mean = window_sum / window
        if readings[i] > mean * threshold:
            spike_indices.append(i)
        window_sum += readings[i] - readings[i - window]
    return spike_indices


def sliding_correlation(series_a: list[float], series_b: list[float], window: int) -> list[float]:
    correlations = []
    for i in range(len(series_a) - window + 1):
        mean_a = sum(series_a[i:i + window]) / window
        mean_b = sum(series_b[i:i + window]) / window
        cov = 0.0
        for j in range(window):
            cov += (series_a[i + j] - mean_a) * (series_b[i + j] - mean_b)
        correlations.append(cov / window)
    return correlations
